title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination
description: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Learners cumulatively produce a bounded multi-agent execution map through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.
